strings.schematron.title: Mobility - Recommended (v3.0.0)
strings.mobility-300-rec.pattern.assert.1: Application layer protocol must be from the controlled vocabulary and can appear at most once (mobilitydcatap:applicationLayerProtocol)
strings.mobility-300-rec.pattern.assert.10: Temporal coverage must be a blank node or IRI (dct:temporal)
strings.mobility-300-rec.pattern.assert.11: Transport mode must be from the controlled vocabulary (https://w3id.org/mobilitydcat-ap/transport-mode/*) (mobilitydcatap:transportMode)
strings.mobility-300-rec.pattern.assert.2: Description must have valid EU language tag, cannot be empty, each language only once (dct:description)
strings.mobility-300-rec.pattern.assert.3: Licence must be a blank node or IRI and can appear at most once (dct:license)
strings.mobility-300-rec.pattern.assert.4: Georeferencing method must be from the controlled vocabulary (https://w3id.org/mobilitydcat-ap/georeferencing-method/*) (mobilitydcatap:georeferencingMethod)
strings.mobility-300-rec.pattern.assert.5: Contact point must be a blank node or IRI (dcat:contactPoint)
strings.mobility-300-rec.pattern.assert.6: Keywords must have valid EU language tags and cannot be empty (dcat:keyword)
strings.mobility-300-rec.pattern.assert.7: Network coverage must be from the controlled vocabulary (https://w3id.org/mobilitydcat-ap/network-coverage/*) (mobilitydcatap:networkCoverage)
strings.mobility-300-rec.pattern.assert.8: Rights holder must be a blank node or IRI (dct:rightsHolder)
strings.mobility-300-rec.pattern.assert.9: Theme must be from the EU Data Themes vocabulary (http://publications.europa.eu/resource/authority/data-theme/*) (dcat:theme)
strings.mobility-300-rec.pattern.report.1: Application layer protocol must be from the controlled vocabulary and can appear at most once (mobilitydcatap:applicationLayerProtocol)
strings.mobility-300-rec.pattern.report.10: Temporal coverage must be a blank node or IRI (dct:temporal)
strings.mobility-300-rec.pattern.report.11: Transport mode must be from the controlled vocabulary (https://w3id.org/mobilitydcat-ap/transport-mode/*) (mobilitydcatap:transportMode)
strings.mobility-300-rec.pattern.report.2: Description must have valid EU language tag, cannot be empty, each language only once (dct:description)
strings.mobility-300-rec.pattern.report.3: Licence must be a blank node or IRI and can appear at most once (dct:license)
strings.mobility-300-rec.pattern.report.4: Georeferencing method must be from the controlled vocabulary (https://w3id.org/mobilitydcat-ap/georeferencing-method/*) (mobilitydcatap:georeferencingMethod)
strings.mobility-300-rec.pattern.report.5: Contact point must be a blank node or IRI (dcat:contactPoint)
strings.mobility-300-rec.pattern.report.6: Keywords must have valid EU language tags and cannot be empty (dcat:keyword)
strings.mobility-300-rec.pattern.report.7: Network coverage must be from the controlled vocabulary (https://w3id.org/mobilitydcat-ap/network-coverage/*) (mobilitydcatap:networkCoverage)
strings.mobility-300-rec.pattern.report.8: Rights holder must be a blank node or IRI (dct:rightsHolder)
strings.mobility-300-rec.pattern.report.9: Theme must be from the EU Data Themes vocabulary (http://publications.europa.eu/resource/authority/data-theme/*) (dcat:theme)
strings.mobility-300-rec.pattern.title.1: Application layer protocol - The transmitting channel (Application Layer Protocol) of the distribution (§4.11.2).
strings.mobility-300-rec.pattern.title.10: Temporal coverage - This property refers to a temporal period, i.e., the beginning and the end, of the time reference of the delivered content (§4.10.2).
strings.mobility-300-rec.pattern.title.11: Transport mode - This property describes the transport mode that is covered by the delivered content (§4.10.2).
strings.mobility-300-rec.pattern.title.2: Description - A free-text account of the Distribution. May be repeated for parallel language versions (§4.11.2).
strings.mobility-300-rec.pattern.title.3: Licence - The licence under which the Distribution is made available (§4.11.2).
strings.mobility-300-rec.pattern.title.4: Georeferencing method - This property SHOULD be used to specify the georeferencing method used in the dataset (§4.10.2).
strings.mobility-300-rec.pattern.title.5: Contact point - This property contains contact information that can be used for communication with a company or person responsible for the dataset (§4.10.2).
strings.mobility-300-rec.pattern.title.6: Keyword / tag - This property contains a keyword or tag describing the Dataset (§4.10.2).
strings.mobility-300-rec.pattern.title.7: Network coverage - This property describes the part of the transport network that is covered by the delivered content (§4.10.2).
strings.mobility-300-rec.pattern.title.8: Rights holder - This property refers to an entity that legally owns or holds the rights of the data provided in a dataset (§4.10.2).
strings.mobility-300-rec.pattern.title.9: Theme / category - This property refers to the generic theme (i.e., a specific subject, category, or type) of the delivered content. The category is described via a controlled vocabulary 'Data Themes' by the Publications Office of the European Union (§4.10.2).
